base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_sacred_flame_cycle — a effect_layer from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. 'Sacred flame' — 6-frame flame-cycle animation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'Sacred flame' — 6-frame flame-cycle animation; appears at mansion entrances / altar sequences
